caption: A blonde woman is seated in front of a textured purple background, wearing a black t-shirt with the white text "WHO'S IN YOUR" and "ELE..." partially visible below it. She wears a small beige headset microphone near her mouth. Throughout the sequence, she is engaged in speaking, with her facial expressions shifting slightly as she talks. In the first frame, she is looking toward the left with her mouth open. By the second frame, she has turned her gaze more toward the center, her expression becoming more neutral. In the third frame, she continues to look forward while speaking, and in the final frame, she maintains this position while gesturing slightly with her hands, which are partially visible at the bottom of the frame. A small portion of another person's grey-sleeved arm is visible on the right edge of the scene.
